fresh_facts.claim: At least 2,500 Marines and sailors aboard the USS Tripoli arrived in the Middle East with aviation assets and rapid-response ground units as of March 30, 2026.
The USS Tripoli carries over 3,500 sailors and Marines from the 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit.
Elements of the 82nd Airborne Division have been deployed to the Middle East region positioned within striking distance of Iran's Kharg Island.
Between 1,000 and 4,000 additional 82nd Airborne paratroopers were ordered to deploy within 24 hours of the March 24 deployment announcement.
US troop levels in West Asia reached over 57,000 as of March 30, 2026, representing the largest buildup since the 2003 invasion of Iraq.
The Pentagon plans to ship an additional 10,000 ground troops to the Middle East region.
Hundreds of US Special Operations Forces, including Navy SEALs and Army Rangers, are deployed in the Middle East.
Kharg Island handles 90% of Iran's oil exports according to reported operational analysis.
President Donald Trump announced a 10-day suspension of strikes on Iranian power plants until April 6, 2026, at 8 p.m. ET at Iran's request on March 26, 2026.
Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei died in early March 2026, leading to leadership transitions to ultra-hardliners.
The Assembly of Experts elected a successor to Supreme Leader Khamenei following his death in early March 2026.
Hardline IRGC elements dominate decision-making with no evidence of fractures or defections despite strikes as of late March 2026.
Mohammad Bagher Zolghadr, a security insider, was appointed secretary of the Supreme National Security Council in January 2026 post-protests.
IRGC effectively suppressed 2025-2026 protests with no new unrest reported as of late March 2026.
A jailbreak occurred in Mariwan in January 2026 following strikes on detention facilities.
Polymarket traders assessed a 99.9% probability of Iranian regime survival past March 31, 2026, citing absent mass defections amid escalation.
US-Israeli strikes targeted ballistic missile facilities in Iran as of March 29, 2026.
Strikes targeted Iranian leadership facilities including the Assembly of Experts and IRGC bases as of late March 2026.

regime_fall.current_status: US military presence in West Asia has surged to over 57,000 troops with planned additional 10,000 deployments, including USS Tripoli's 3,500-person MEU and 82nd Airborne elements positioned near Kharg Island, while Trump maintains diplomatic pause on strikes until April 6 despite Iran's rejection of ceasefire terms and succession to hardline leadership following Khamenei's death.
regime_fall.last_major_event: US troop levels in West Asia reached over 57,000 as of March 30, 2026, representing the largest military buildup since the 2003 invasion of Iraq, with additional 10,000 ground troops planned for deployment.
